name: EARTH 0 - DC RPG
description:
An RPG system set in the DC Universe, Earth-0 as it could be considered the DEFAULT of DC, and perhaps the most well known by Janitor itself after testing its knowledge on other multiple universes.

The introduction is open and you're free to use it as you want. I had much to experiment and found it pretty consistent. Let me know if there's other things that can be done to it.

v.1.0
creator: Rocce
